2	name: 'step-03b-execute-finish'
3	description: 'Finalize each story (commit/status), trigger retrospective when epic complete, and finish execution loop'
4	nextStep: './step-03c-execute-complete.md'
5	scriptsDir: '../scripts/story-automator'
6	outputFile: '{output_folder}/story-automator/orchestration-{epic_id}-{timestamp}.md'
7	---
8	
9	# Step 3b: Finalize Story + Wrap Execution
10	
11	**Goal:** After code review completes for a story, commit changes, verify sprint status, update progress, and finish the loop.
12	**Interaction mode:** Deterministic autonomous execution.
13	
14	---
15	
16	## Story Loop (Continue from Step 3)
17	
18	### E. Git Commit
19	
20	**Required:** Commit after every story (do not skip).
21	
22	```bash
23	commit=$("{scriptsDir}" commit-story --repo "{project-root}" --story {story_id} --title "{title}")
24	ok=$(echo "$commit" | jq -r '.ok')
25	```
26	
27	- If `ok == true`:
28	  ```bash
29	  # Update Story Progress: mark git-commit done
30	  tmp_state=$(mktemp)
31	  sed "s/^| ${story_id} |.*$/| ${story_id} | done | done | done | done | done | in-progress |/" "{outputFile}" > "$tmp_state" && mv "$tmp_state" "{outputFile}"
32	  ```
33	  → proceed to F
34	- If `ok == false` → log warning and escalate
35	
36	### F. Verify Sprint Status
37	
38	```bash
39	# Check sprint-status with story file fallback (v1.4.0)
40	normalized=$("{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper normalize-key {story_id})
41	story_key=$(echo "$normalized" | jq -r '.key')
42	status=$("{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper sprint-status get "$story_key")
43	is_done=$(echo "$status" | jq -r '.done')
44	
45	# Fallback: trust story file if sprint-status disagrees
46	if [ "$is_done" != "true" ]; then
47	    file_done=$("{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper story-file-status {story_id} | jq -r '.status')
48	    [ "$file_done" = "done" ] && is_done="true"
49	fi
50	```
51	
52	- If `is_done == false` → return to Code Review Loop (Step 3, section D)
53	- If `is_done == true` → proceed to G
54	
55	### G. Story Complete
56	Display: "**✅ Story {N} complete.**"
57	```bash
58	"{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper state-update "{outputFile}" \
59	  --set lastUpdated="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
60	echo "- **[$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)]** Story {story_id}: ✅ complete (commit + sprint-status verified)" >> "{outputFile}"
61	
62	# Update Story Progress: mark story done
63	tmp_state=$(mktemp)
64	sed "s/^| ${story_id} |.*$/| ${story_id} | done | done | done | done | done | done |/" "{outputFile}" > "$tmp_state" && mv "$tmp_state" "{outputFile}"
65	```
66	Display: `[story {N}/{total}] finalize -> done`
67	
68	### H. Check Epic Completion & Trigger Retrospective (Multi-Epic Support)
69	
70	After each story completes, check if ALL stories in this epic are now done. Retrospective only triggers when every story in the epic has passed code review and sprint status confirms all are "done".
71	
72	#### H.1 Check All Stories Done
73	
74	```bash
75	# Run epic-level check in parallel with per-story checks
76	tmp_epic_status=$(mktemp)
77	("{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper sprint-status check-epic {epic_number} > "$tmp_epic_status") &
78	epic_status_pid=$!
79	
80	# Get all stories for this epic and verify each is done
81	epic_stories=$("{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper get-epic-stories {epic_number} --state-file "{outputFile}")
82	stories_ok=$(echo "$epic_stories" | jq -r '.ok')
83	story_count=$(echo "$epic_stories" | jq -r '.count')
84	all_done=true
85	
86	if [ "$stories_ok" != "true" ] || [ "$story_count" -eq 0 ]; then
87	    all_done=false
88	else
89	    tmp_story_checks=$(mktemp)
90	    echo "$epic_stories" | jq -r '.stories[]' \
91	      | xargs -I{} -P 4 sh -c '
92	          status=$("'"{scriptsDir}"'" orchestrator-helper sprint-status get "{}")
93	          done=$(echo "$status" | jq -r ".done")
94	          [ "$done" = "true" ] && echo "{}|done" || echo "{}|not_done"
95	        ' > "$tmp_story_checks"
96	
97	    if rg -q '\|not_done$' "$tmp_story_checks"; then
98	      all_done=false
99	    fi
100	    rm -f "$tmp_story_checks"
101	fi
102	```
103	
104	#### H.2 Secondary Verification via Sprint Status
105	
106	```bash
107	# Double-check: use result from parallel epic-level check
108	wait "$epic_status_pid"
109	epic_status=$(cat "$tmp_epic_status")
110	rm -f "$tmp_epic_status"
111	
112	epic_complete=$(echo "$epic_status" | jq -r '.allStoriesDone')
113	epic_ok=$(echo "$epic_status" | jq -r '.ok')
114	
115	# Both checks must pass
116	if [ "$all_done" = "true" ] && [ "$epic_ok" = "true" ] && [ "$epic_complete" = "true" ]; then
117	    trigger_retro=true
118	else
119	    trigger_retro=false
120	fi
121	```
122	
123	#### H.3 Trigger Retrospective (Only When Epic Fully Complete)
124	
125	**IF trigger_retro == true:**
126	
127	1. Display: "**✅ Epic {epic_number} complete! All stories passed code review. Triggering retrospective (YOLO mode)...**"
128	2. Log: `- **[{timestamp}]** Epic {epic_number}: ALL STORIES DONE - triggering retrospective`
129	
130	```bash
131	# CRITICAL: Use build-cmd to get full YOLO prompt with doc verification.
132	# Pass `"$retro_model"` quoted so bracketed IDs like `claude-opus-4-7[1m]`
133	# survive shell expansion intact.
134	retro_selection=$("{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper retro-agent --state-file "{outputFile}")
135	retro_agent=$(echo "$retro_selection" | jq -r '.primary')
136	retro_model=$(echo "$retro_selection" | jq -r '.model // ""')
137	if [ -n "$retro_model" ]; then
138	    cmd=$("{scriptsDir}" tmux-wrapper build-cmd retro {epic_number} --agent "$retro_agent" --model "$retro_model")
139	else
140	    cmd=$("{scriptsDir}" tmux-wrapper build-cmd retro {epic_number} --agent "$retro_agent")
141	fi
142	session=$("{scriptsDir}" tmux-wrapper spawn retro "" {epic_number} --agent "$retro_agent" --command "$cmd")
143	
144	# Monitor with safe failure (never escalate on retro failure)
145	retro_timeout=60
146	[ "$story_count" -gt 10 ] && retro_timeout=90
147	result=$("{scriptsDir}" monitor-session "$session" --json --agent "$retro_agent" --timeout "$retro_timeout")
148	"{scriptsDir}" tmux-wrapper kill "$session"
149	
150	retro_status=$(echo "$result" | jq -r '.final_state')
151	
152	if [ "$retro_status" = "completed" ] || [ "$retro_status" = "success" ]; then
153	    echo "- **[{timestamp}]** Epic {epic_number} retrospective: completed successfully" >> "{outputFile}"
154	else
155	    echo "- **[{timestamp}]** Epic {epic_number} retrospective: skipped (reason: $retro_status)" >> "{outputFile}"
156	fi
157	```
158	
159	3. Update state document with retrospective status:
160	```yaml
161	retrospectives:
162	  epic-{epic_number}:
163	    status: "completed" | "skipped"
164	    reason: "{reason_if_skipped}"
165	    timestamp: "{timestamp}"
166	```
167	
168	4. **Continue to next story regardless of retrospective result** (retrospectives never block)
169	
170	**IF trigger_retro == false:**
171	- Continue to next story (epic not yet complete)
172	
173	**IMPORTANT RULES:**
174	- **ALL stories must be done**: Retrospective only triggers when every story in the epic shows "done" in sprint status
175	- **Use configured retro agent**: Resolve retrospective agent from `agentConfig` before spawn
176	- **Never escalate; non-blocking**: If retrospective fails for any reason, log warning and continue
177	
178	**END FOR EACH**
179	
180	## Then
181	→ After all stories complete, load and execute `{nextStep}`

file.content:
---
name: 'step-03b-execute-finish'
description: 'Finalize each story (commit/status), trigger retrospective when epic complete, and finish execution loop'
nextStep: './step-03c-execute-complete.md'
scriptsDir: '../scripts/story-automator'
outputFile: '{output_folder}/story-automator/orchestration-{epic_id}-{timestamp}.md'
---

# Step 3b: Finalize Story + Wrap Execution

**Goal:** After code review completes for a story, commit changes, verify sprint status, update progress, and finish the loop.
**Interaction mode:** Deterministic autonomous execution.

---

## Story Loop (Continue from Step 3)

### E. Git Commit

**Required:** Commit after every story (do not skip).

```bash
commit=$("{scriptsDir}" commit-story --repo "{project-root}" --story {story_id} --title "{title}")
ok=$(echo "$commit" | jq -r '.ok')
```

- If `ok == true`:
  ```bash
  # Update Story Progress: mark git-commit done
  tmp_state=$(mktemp)
  sed "s/^| ${story_id} |.*$/| ${story_id} | done | done | done | done | done | in-progress |/" "{outputFile}" > "$tmp_state" && mv "$tmp_state" "{outputFile}"
  ```
  → proceed to F
- If `ok == false` → log warning and escalate

### F. Verify Sprint Status

```bash
# Check sprint-status with story file fallback (v1.4.0)
normalized=$("{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper normalize-key {story_id})
story_key=$(echo "$normalized" | jq -r '.key')
status=$("{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper sprint-status get "$story_key")
is_done=$(echo "$status" | jq -r '.done')

# Fallback: trust story file if sprint-status disagrees
if [ "$is_done" != "true" ]; then
    file_done=$("{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper story-file-status {story_id} | jq -r '.status')
    [ "$file_done" = "done" ] && is_done="true"
fi
```

- If `is_done == false` → return to Code Review Loop (Step 3, section D)
- If `is_done == true` → proceed to G

### G. Story Complete
Display: "**✅ Story {N} complete.**"
```bash
"{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper state-update "{outputFile}" \
  --set lastUpdated="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
echo "- **[$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)]** Story {story_id}: ✅ complete (commit + sprint-status verified)" >> "{outputFile}"

# Update Story Progress: mark story done
tmp_state=$(mktemp)
sed "s/^| ${story_id} |.*$/| ${story_id} | done | done | done | done | done | done |/" "{outputFile}" > "$tmp_state" && mv "$tmp_state" "{outputFile}"
```
Display: `[story {N}/{total}] finalize -> done`

### H. Check Epic Completion & Trigger Retrospective (Multi-Epic Support)

After each story completes, check if ALL stories in this epic are now done. Retrospective only triggers when every story in the epic has passed code review and sprint status confirms all are "done".

#### H.1 Check All Stories Done

```bash
# Run epic-level check in parallel with per-story checks
tmp_epic_status=$(mktemp)
("{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper sprint-status check-epic {epic_number} > "$tmp_epic_status") &
epic_status_pid=$!

# Get all stories for this epic and verify each is done
epic_stories=$("{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper get-epic-stories {epic_number} --state-file "{outputFile}")
stories_ok=$(echo "$epic_stories" | jq -r '.ok')
story_count=$(echo "$epic_stories" | jq -r '.count')
all_done=true

if [ "$stories_ok" != "true" ] || [ "$story_count" -eq 0 ]; then
    all_done=false
else
    tmp_story_checks=$(mktemp)
    echo "$epic_stories" | jq -r '.stories[]' \
      | xargs -I{} -P 4 sh -c '
          status=$("'"{scriptsDir}"'" orchestrator-helper sprint-status get "{}")
          done=$(echo "$status" | jq -r ".done")
          [ "$done" = "true" ] && echo "{}|done" || echo "{}|not_done"
        ' > "$tmp_story_checks"

    if rg -q '\|not_done$' "$tmp_story_checks"; then
      all_done=false
    fi
    rm -f "$tmp_story_checks"
fi
```

#### H.2 Secondary Verification via Sprint Status

```bash
# Double-check: use result from parallel epic-level check
wait "$epic_status_pid"
epic_status=$(cat "$tmp_epic_status")
rm -f "$tmp_epic_status"

epic_complete=$(echo "$epic_status" | jq -r '.allStoriesDone')
epic_ok=$(echo "$epic_status" | jq -r '.ok')

# Both checks must pass
if [ "$all_done" = "true" ] && [ "$epic_ok" = "true" ] && [ "$epic_complete" = "true" ]; then
    trigger_retro=true
else
    trigger_retro=false
fi
```

#### H.3 Trigger Retrospective (Only When Epic Fully Complete)

**IF trigger_retro == true:**

1. Display: "**✅ Epic {epic_number} complete! All stories passed code review. Triggering retrospective (YOLO mode)...**"
2. Log: `- **[{timestamp}]** Epic {epic_number}: ALL STORIES DONE - triggering retrospective`

```bash
# CRITICAL: Use build-cmd to get full YOLO prompt with doc verification.
# Pass `"$retro_model"` quoted so bracketed IDs like `claude-opus-4-7[1m]`
# survive shell expansion intact.
retro_selection=$("{scriptsDir}" orchestrator-helper retro-agent --state-file "{outputFile}")
retro_agent=$(echo "$retro_selection" | jq -r '.primary')
retro_model=$(echo "$retro_selection" | jq -r '.model // ""')
if [ -n "$retro_model" ]; then
    cmd=$("{scriptsDir}" tmux-wrapper build-cmd retro {epic_number} --agent "$retro_agent" --model "$retro_model")
else
    cmd=$("{scriptsDir}" tmux-wrapper build-cmd retro {epic_number} --agent "$retro_agent")
fi
session=$("{scriptsDir}" tmux-wrapper spawn retro "" {epic_number} --agent "$retro_agent" --command "$cmd")

# Monitor with safe failure (never escalate on retro failure)
retro_timeout=60
[ "$story_count" -gt 10 ] && retro_timeout=90
result=$("{scriptsDir}" monitor-session "$session" --json --agent "$retro_agent" --timeout "$retro_timeout")
"{scriptsDir}" tmux-wrapper kill "$session"

retro_status=$(echo "$result" | jq -r '.final_state')

if [ "$retro_status" = "completed" ] || [ "$retro_status" = "success" ]; then
    echo "- **[{timestamp}]** Epic {epic_number} retrospective: completed successfully" >> "{outputFile}"
else
    echo "- **[{timestamp}]** Epic {epic_number} retrospective: skipped (reason: $retro_status)" >> "{outputFile}"
fi
```

3. Update state document with retrospective status:
```yaml
retrospectives:
  epic-{epic_number}:
    status: "completed" | "skipped"
    reason: "{reason_if_skipped}"
    timestamp: "{timestamp}"
```

4. **Continue to next story regardless of retrospective result** (retrospectives never block)

**IF trigger_retro == false:**
- Continue to next story (epic not yet complete)

**IMPORTANT RULES:**
- **ALL stories must be done**: Retrospective only triggers when every story in the epic shows "done" in sprint status
- **Use configured retro agent**: Resolve retrospective agent from `agentConfig` before spawn
- **Never escalate; non-blocking**: If retrospective fails for any reason, log warning and continue

**END FOR EACH**

## Then
→ After all stories complete, load and execute `{nextStep}`

echo "Commit result: $commit"
